news.text:
🌟 NEW GACHA & ISABELLE EVENT!

The Isabelle Sticker Event is LIVE! Only 9 days left! Jump in to earn coins and unlock exclusive wallpapers. Once the event ends, these wallpapers will be gone forever! 🎰 Weekly Gacha System Try your luck! Use 5 coins to spin the crank and win exclusive wallpapers. Coming soon: secret stickers and packs! Stay tuned. 🎨 Custom Theme Colors You can now pick your favorite color in the Favorites menu. This color will be available when configuring your wallpapers and battery themes! Thank you so much for your amazing support. Report bugs to: app@untal3d.com - Deivis
